__comment__: Spawnable-repo allowlist for the Slack orchestrator. Copy to ~/.tmux/spawnable-repos.json (or set SLACK_SPAWN_ALLOWLIST_FILE) and edit. Keys are repo names as Spark returns them; values are ABSOLUTE local checkout paths the agent is spawned in (`tmux new-window -c <path>`). Only repos listed here can be auto-spawned. Remove this __comment__ key in your real file or leave it — it is ignored (never a valid repo name).
